title: PhysicalProperties Object
description: The physical properties of a Component, Occurrence or BRepBody

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: getPrincipalAxes
methods.description: Method that returns the principal axes.

methods.name: getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia
methods.description: Method that returns the moments of inertia about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

methods.name: getRadiusOfGyration
methods.description: Method that returns the radius of gyration about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is cm.

methods.name: getRotationToPrincipal
methods.description: Gets the rotation from the world coordinate system of the target to the principal coordinate system.

methods.name: getXYZMomentsOfInertia
methods.description: Method that gets the moment of inertia about the world coordinate system. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

properties.name: accuracy
properties.description: Returns the accuracy that was used for the calculation.

properties.name: area
properties.description: Gets the area in square centimeters.

properties.name: centerOfMass
properties.description: Returns the center of mass position

properties.name: density
properties.description: Gets the density in kilograms per cubic centimeter.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: volume
properties.description: Gets the volume in the cubic centimeters.

related_samples.name: Get Physical Properties API Sample
related_samples.description: Script that demonstrates getting physical properties using the API. When this script is run it will create a new document, build a simple model, and get the various physical properties from the model.

accuracy.title: PhysicalProperties.accuracy Property
accuracy.description: Returns the accuracy that was used for the calculation.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = physicalProperties_var.accuracy

related_samples.description: Script that demonstrates getting physical properties using the API. When this script is run it will create a new document, build a simple model, and get the various physical properties from the model.

classType.title: PhysicalProperties.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

getPrincipalAxes.title: PhysicalProperties.getPrincipalAxes Method
getPrincipalAxes.description: Method that returns the principal axes.

parameters.name: xAxis
parameters.description: The output Vector3D object that indicates the direction of the x axis.

parameters.name: yAxis
parameters.description: The output Vector3D object that indicates the direction of the y axis.

parameters.name: zAxis
parameters.description: The output Vector3D object that indicates the direction of the z axis.

related_samples.name: Get Physical Properties API Sample
related_samples.description: Script that demonstrates getting physical properties using the API. When this script is run it will create a new document, build a simple model, and get the various physical properties from the model.

getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia.title: PhysicalProperties.getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia Method
getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia.description: Method that returns the moments of inertia about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

parameters.name: i1
parameters.description: Output Double that specifies the first moment of inertia.

parameters.name: i2
parameters.description: Output Double that specifies the second moment of inertia.

parameters.name: i3
parameters.description: Output Double that specifies the third moment of inertia.

related_samples.name: Get Physical Properties API Sample
related_samples.description: Script that demonstrates getting physical properties using the API. When this script is run it will create a new document, build a simple model, and get the various physical properties from the model.

getRadiusOfGyration.title: PhysicalProperties.getRadiusOfGyration Method
getRadiusOfGyration.description: Method that returns the radius of gyration about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is cm.

parameters.name: kx
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the X partial radius of gyration.

parameters.name: ky
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the Y partial radius of gyration.

parameters.name: kz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the Z partial radius of gyration.

related_samples.name: Get Physical Properties API Sample
related_samples.description: Script that demonstrates getting physical properties using the API. When this script is run it will create a new document, build a simple model, and get the various physical properties from the model.

getRotationToPrincipal.description: Gets the rotation from the world coordinate system of the target to the principal coordinate system.

getXYZMomentsOfInertia.title: PhysicalProperties.getXYZMomentsOfInertia Method
getXYZMomentsOfInertia.description: Method that gets the moment of inertia about the world coordinate system. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

syntax.python: (returnValue, xx, yy, zz, xy, yz, xz) = physicalProperties_var.getXYZMomentsOfInertia()
syntax.cpp: #include getXYZMomentsOfInertia(xx, yy, zz, xy, yz, xz);

parameters.name: xx
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XX partial moment.

parameters.name: yy
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the YY partial moment.

parameters.name: zz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the ZZ partial moment.

parameters.name: xy
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XY partial moment.

parameters.name: yz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the YZ partial moment.

parameters.name: xz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XZ partial moment.

related_samples.name: Get Physical Properties API Sample
related_samples.description: Script that demonstrates getting physical properties using the API. When this script is run it will create a new document, build a simple model, and get the various physical properties from the model.
